fields.name: targetEntity
fields.description: The entity to which lifecycle rules apply.

fields.name: ranAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the lifecycle run occurred.

fields.name: errors
fields.description: A textual description of any errors encountered.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle status (also lets the standalone default target validate).

fields.name: headId
fields.description: Scratch: id of the record the scan loop is currently transitioning.

fields.name: headStatus
fields.description: Scratch: the status applied to the current record.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Age threshold (days)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Records older than this many days transition fromStatus → toStatus.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Age date field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Numeric (ms-epoch) entity field measured against the age threshold (e.g. 'createdAt').

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dry-run mode
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true, surfaces the knobs but the scan does not persist transitions.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Auto-archive old records
overridableConfigKeys.description: Automatically change the status of records once they age past a threshold. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, retention, ttl, expire, archive after, sunset, lifecycle, age out, time-based status, scheduled transitions, expire old records, auto-archive

overridableConfigKeys.label: From status
overridableConfigKeys.description: Only records currently in this status are eligible to transition.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity name to scan and transition (e.g. 'Task'). Defaults to the atom's own log so the standalone validates; rebind per composition.

overridableConfigKeys.label: To status
overridableConfigKeys.description: Status applied to a record once it ages past the threshold (e.g. 'archived').
